author: Teller
text:
bl close: cross-repo delivered_in via delivered_repo on local miss

Symmetric write-side of bl-f37b. populate_on_close grows a resolve_remote knob, surfaced as `bl close --resolve-remote` (mirrors `bl show --resolve-remote`). Off by default; auto-engages in deferred mode because the closer is typically not the clone that produced the squash — bridge sync hooks closing on behalf of a sibling code repo. Soft-fail on unreachable URL.

Also splits close paths into src/review_close.rs to keep review.rs under the 300-line cap, and lifts shared test fixtures into delivery_test_support so the bl-e454 tests don't push delivery_tests over.
